title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.247 - Massage business, license required, application, fee, discipline for failure to obtain
text:
324.247.  Massage business, license required, application, fee, discipline for failure to obtain. — A person desiring to receive a license to operate a massage business in the state of Missouri shall file a written application with the board on a form prescribed by the board and pay the appropriate required fee.  It shall be unlawful for a business to employ or contract with any person in this state to provide massage therapy as defined in subdivision (7) of section 324.240 unless such person has obtained a license as provided by this chapter.  Failure to comply with the provisions of this section shall be cause to discipline the licensee.
(L. 1998 H.B. 1601, et al., A.L. 1999 H.B. 343 merged with S.B. 362, A.L. 2006 S.B. 756, A.L. 2009 S.B. 296)
